Cozmic Wallpapers
Privacy Support

Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters.

Cozmic Wallpapers is committed to maintaining your privacy and processing your information in accordance with applicable privacy laws, including the EU General Data Protection Regulation where it applies.

Effective date: June 18, 2026

1. Scope

This Privacy Policy applies to websites and mobile applications owned or controlled by Cozmic Wallpapers, including the Cozmic Wallpapers mobile app listed through the Cozmic Wallpapers developer pages on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

Please read this policy carefully to understand how data is collected, processed, managed, and used, and to understand the rights that may be available to you as a data subject.

2. Information We Collect

We collect information that you provide, information created when you use the app, and information needed to operate, secure, and improve Cozmic Wallpapers. The categories below may be linked to an app user ID or device/session identifier unless we remove or de-identify that link.

User Content

  • Prompts and other text you submit
  • Generated photos, videos, images, or wallpapers
  • Other user-directed content created or saved through the app

Identifiers

  • Generated app user ID
  • Device or session identifiers used for app functionality
  • App Store or platform transaction identifiers where needed

Purchases

  • Purchase history
  • Credit balance and credit pack transactions
  • Receipt or transaction metadata needed to verify purchases

Usage Data

  • Product interaction
  • Feature usage and generation activity
  • Settings such as style, aspect ratio, and resolution choices

Diagnostics

  • Crash data
  • Performance data
  • Other diagnostic data, logs, or operational signals

3. How We Use Information

We use collected information for the purposes described below.

  • App functionality: to generate wallpapers, save generation history, manage credit balances, process purchases, restore eligible transactions, and provide core app features.
  • Product personalization: to personalize the app experience, associate generated content with your app user ID, preserve settings, and improve prompt, style, and wallpaper workflows.
  • Analytics: to understand how the app is used, monitor performance, identify issues, improve reliability, and make product decisions.
  • Security and compliance: to prevent abuse, detect fraud, enforce terms, verify purchases, respond to legal requests, and comply with tax, accounting, payment, and legal obligations.

4. Service Providers and Sharing

We may share information with service providers that help us provide Cozmic Wallpapers. These may include Firebase and Google Cloud for database, storage, functions, diagnostics, and infrastructure; Google AI services for prompt processing and image generation; and Apple, Google Play, or other app stores for app distribution, payment processing, purchase verification, refunds, and platform review.

We may also disclose information when required to comply with law, respond to valid legal process, protect users or the service, prevent fraud or abuse, enforce our rights, or complete a business transfer.

5. Storage, Retention, and Security

App user ID records, generation metadata, credit records, and generated wallpaper references may be stored using Firebase or Google Cloud services. Generated images may be stored in cloud storage under paths associated with the relevant app user ID.

We keep information for as long as needed to provide the app, maintain records, resolve disputes, comply with legal obligations, and protect the service. Some purchase, refund, fraud-prevention, tax, accounting, and legal records may need to be retained even after app user ID data or generation history is deleted.

We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect information, but no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.

6. Your Choices and Rights

Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, export, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information. You may also have the right to withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.

You can choose whether to grant photo or media library permissions. Without that permission, you may still be able to generate wallpapers, but direct saving to your device library may not work.

To submit a privacy request, use the support information available on the Cozmic Wallpapers Support page or through the app store listing.

7. Children

Cozmic Wallpapers is not intended for children under the age required by applicable law to consent to data processing. If you believe a child has provided personal information, please contact us so we can review and respond appropriately.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the effective date and may provide additional notice in the app, on this website, or through another appropriate channel.

9. Contact

For privacy questions, data requests, deletion requests, or concerns, please use the contact method listed on the Cozmic Wallpapers Support page or the support contact shown in the app store listing.

© 2026 Cozmic Wallpapers. All rights reserved.
